title: Kanbus clock: COMMENT body uses Bytesized compact layout

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implementing request: render COMMENT body lines in bytesized font and tighten line spacing/row height to fit more message text on-device.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented compact COMMENT rendering: comment notices now carry bytesized body_font with tighter row sizing (min 7 / max 9) and up to 7 body lines. Wrapped comment text uses bytesized measurement and wider safe body width (62px) to fit more content without overflow. Validation: py_compile + tests/test_kanbus_clock.py (14 passed). Ready for restart + live visual confirmation.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Follow-up UX tweak from live feedback: COMMENT body should be left-justified and packed tighter vertically. Implementing comment-specific body alignment=left and disabling vertical centering pad for that notice type, with tighter row-height bounds.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Additional refinement: COMMENT header must use bytesized and tight vertical padding (1px top + 1px bottom). Implementing header_font override and compact header height computation from measured glyph height + 2.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented COMMENT header styling tweak: header now uses bytesized with tight padding (height computed as measured glyph height + 2). COMMENT body remains bytesized, left-aligned, compact rows. Validation: py_compile + tests/test_kanbus_clock.py (14 passed). Triggered fresh Korporus comment event for visual check.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: New visual adjustments requested: reduce COMMENT line spacing to 2px (between issue ID and first comment line, and between subsequent lines) and render issue ID two intensity steps darker than comment text.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented spacing/color refinement: COMMENT rows now target measured bytesized glyph height + 2px total vertical padding (1px top + 1px bottom) to produce ~2px inter-line spacing; first body line (issue ID) is darkened by 2 intensity steps relative to comment text. Validation: py_compile + tests/test_kanbus_clock.py (14 passed).

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Applying requested micro-adjustment: add 1 extra pixel below COMMENT text before the row bottom border (tight header mode), while keeping bytesized header font.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented extra COMMENT header bottom spacing: tight header height now uses measured glyph height + 3 (previously +2), creating one additional pixel above the bottom border line. Updated tests accordingly; py_compile + tests/test_kanbus_clock.py pass (14). Triggered fresh Korporus comment event for visual verification.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Closed after live confirmation: COMMENT header/body typography now matches requested behavior (bytesized header/body, tighter vertical packing, left-justified body, darker issue-id line, and extra pixel above header border).
